text: United Elite Group transformed our Brooklyn brownstone into the home we always envisioned. Their attention to detail, clear communication, and craftsmanship exceeded every expectation. The team treated our home as if it were their own.
author: Sarah & James M.

text: As an interior designer, I rely on contractors who can execute complex designs flawlessly. United Elite Group is that rare partner — they understand the nuance behind every specification and deliver with true precision.
author: Alexandra Chen

text: Our Upper East Side renovation was completed on schedule and within budget. What impressed us most was the open communication throughout — we always knew exactly where the project stood. Truly white-glove service.
author: Robert T.

text: The kitchen renovation they completed for us is absolutely stunning. The custom millwork and the way they handled the plumbing reroute in a co-op building showed their expertise with NYC-specific challenges.
author: Maria & David P.

text: I've worked with many contractors in NYC over 20 years as an architect. United Elite Group stands apart for their professionalism, their understanding of landmark building requirements, and their exceptional finish quality.
author: Michael Rothstein, AIA

text: They navigated all the DOB permits and co-op board approvals seamlessly. We barely had to lift a finger. The result is a complete transformation of our West Chelsea apartment that we are absolutely in love with.
author: Jennifer & Paul K.
